I now come against all patterns of political and social injustice in my ancestry. I seal all genetic channels of deprivation, slavery, and false imprisonment—suppression of any kind: poverty and crime in the Blood of Jesus.

I come against all patterns of political and social injustice. I renounce all patterns of social and racial rejection. I cut all ties to brutalizing, throwing people away. I come against all patterns of homelessness and helplessness. I stand against all patterns suffering from over conditions, harsh climates, and severe winters.

Father, send the oil of Your Holy Spirit into these patterns in my family ancestry and heal all memory of pain.

Father, forgive all the people who cause them harm. Let those in my bloodline know the patterns of justice, healthy living conditions, enough food, and enough memory. warmth and shelter.
